title: Farla Medical MediHands Vinyl Clear Gloves, Box of 1000 - Disposable Vinyl Gloves Large - Powder Free, Latex Free, & Protein Free Clear Gloves - Multi-Purpose, Single Use
features: Premium Quality - Durable and puncture resistant, MediHands Vinyl Disposable Gloves offer excellent protection against cuts or abrasions.
Protein & Latex Free - MediHands non latex gloves do not contain powder latex to reduce skin irritation.
Powder Free Gloves - All MediHands protective gloves are powder free to avoid the risk of contamination in sensitive environments.
Ambidextrous Fitting - Latex free gloves that you can wear on either hand. Also features beaded cuff for drip protection and increased glove strength.

Medical Grade - These gloves disposable have an AQL rating of 1.5, EN455 compliant and CE approved. MediHands Gloves are produced by Farla Medical Healthcare, an expert manufacturer of medical items used by practitioners worldwide.
description: Product Description MediHands Nitrile Gloves are premium-quality, latex-free, disposable gloves, suitable for both home and medical use. Designed to be puncture-resistant, MediHands gloves protect your hands from cuts and abrasions and help avoid the risk of contamination when used in sensitive environments. Features an ambidextrous fitting which means you can wear them on either hand, while its beaded cuff offers drip protection and increased glove strength. MediHands Gloves have an AQL rating of 1.5 (medical-grade), EN455 compliant and CE approved. Produced by Farla Medical, an expert manufacturer of medical items used by practitioners worldwide. Available in Small, Medium, Large and Extra Large sizes. Completely seamless Latex free Non Sterile Nitrile Pack of 100 Manufacturer Contact Information Daniel@farla.co.uk
